title: Guudrian

Guudria appears to be one such case.</ref>

{{Quote|Boom, boom.|Boom, a Guudrian pyromaniac|<ref name="DSC" />}}
'''Guudrians''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] beings from the [[Guudria system/Legends|Guudria system]]. Each Guudrian was distinguished by a warty, wrinkled face, a short snout, and a wild mane of hair. Their [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] sported a pattern of [[Color/Legends|black]] checks. Although their [[Tooth/Legends|teeth]] were blunt, Guudrians had clawed [[Limb/Legends|fingers]]. Members of the species emigrated into [[The galaxy/Legends|the greater galaxy]] by [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], when a Guudrian known as [[Boom]] joined the crew of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|corvette]] ''[[FarStar]]''. Although they were relatively unknown away from their home in [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]], Guudrians could nevertheless utilize technology on par with that of the rest of the galaxy.

==Biology and appearance==
Guudrians were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] much smaller than [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] and [[Human/Legends|Humans]],<ref name="KR 20" /> moving about in a stooped posture.<ref name="DSC" /> At least one member of the species had pale, [[Color/Legends|yellow]] skin and fiery red hair that formed a mane around the head and continued down the jowls. Each Guudrian had a flattened tube with twin openings lying atop the [[Bone/Legends|skull]] and running back into the hair, giving the impression of a receding hairline. The Guudrian countenance was marked by two large [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] that were covered in patterns of black checks. Clusters of wart-like bumps and patterns of wrinkles roiled the high forehead, the thick brow, and the knob-like snout. That blunt muzzle extended for a short distance from the rest of the visage, terminating in a single depression at its center. Below that lay a wide mouth full of blunt, white [[Tooth/Legends|teeth]], lilac gums, and a glaucous tongue. Clawlike nails tipped the [[Limb/Legends|fingers]].<ref name="DSC CC" />

==Society and culture==
The Guudrians spoke [[Guudrian language|their own language]]—which at least Duros could learn to understand—and they were capable of mastering at least some words of [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]]. They could learn to operate [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]]-standard technology; for example, a Guudrian known by the nickname [[Boom]] was skilled in using explosives for demolition purposes.<ref name="DSC" />

==History==
The Guudrians hailed from the [[Guudria system/Legends|Guudria system]], a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] in [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]]<ref name="Atlas" /><ref name="Planetnamia" /> that was known to at least some members of the greater galaxy by the founding of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]. The species was scarcely known in the galaxy at large, where few [[Sentience/Legends|sentients]] recognized them by either appearance or name.<ref name="DSC" />

At least one Guudrian, nicknamed Boom, had left the system by 4 ABY. He teamed up with a Duros [[Gunner/Legends|gunner]] named [[Krudar]] to travel the galaxy as freelance [[Starship/Legends|starship]] gunners and members of a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] crew before Krudar talked them both onto the crew of a New Republic [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] known as the ''[[FarStar]]''. Boom was infatuated with [[Fire/Legends|fire]] and explosions to the [[Pyromania|point of mania]]. Others found his demeanor odd, as he perpetually muttered to himself and occasionally exclaimed, "Boom!" His fetish for flames extended to burning other people's property as well.<ref name="DSC" /> By the time the ''FarStar'' reached the [[Kathol Rift/Legends|Kathol Rift]], the Guudrian's antics had worn on the nerves of both Krudar and the rest of the crew;<ref name="KR 20" /> nevertheless, he proved his worth by serving as part of a team that placed charges on [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroids]] in the [[Kathol system/Legends|Kathol system]] to create an artificial meteor shower on the planet [[Kathol]] and thus masked the ''FarStar''{{'s}} descent to the world's surface.<ref name="EG">{{DarkStryder|adventure=Endgame (adventure)|book=Endgame}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The Guudrian species was created by [[Peter M. Schweighofer]] as part of the backstory for the character Boom,<ref name="EG" /> introduced as a playable character in ''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]'' boxed set published by [[West End Games]] in [[1995]] for its ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''. Artist [[Mike Vilardi]] illustrated Boom for the character cards included in the set. Boom's statistics indicate that Guudrians receive no significant bonuses or penalties compared to other species in the game except for a slight reduction in running speed.<ref name="DSC CC" /> In [[2009]], authors [[Daniel Wallace]] and [[Jason Fry]] included the Guudria system in ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'', published by [[Del Rey]].<ref name="EA 232">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>
